description.en: Flagship of the 800 Series Diamond. Three-way reverse-wrap floorstander with the Solid Body Tweeter-on-Top diamond dome, a 6" Continuum-cone FST midrange in a stand-alone Turbine head, and twin 10" Aerofoil-cone woofers in the Matrix-braced cabinet. Reference monitor at Abbey Road Studios.
description.es: Tope de gama de la 800 Series Diamond. Floorstander de tres vías con cabinet de envolvente curva (reverse-wrap), el Solid Body Tweeter-on-Top con domo de diamante, midrange de 6" con cono Continuum FST montado en una cabeza Turbine independiente, y dos woofers de 10" con cono Aerofoil dentro del gabinete reforzado por Matrix. Referencia de monitoreo en Abbey Road Studios.
